author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Starbased Delay

Hey everyone, going to rip the band-aid off and announce that we're delaying the launch of Starbased to tomorrow.

This is due to the recent uptick in failed transactions and transaction times. Our team is experiencing these challenges as we've been working on uploading our new programs for Starbased. You can read more about the issues we're facing in this message from our Head of Engineering, @Buzzec: ⁠📢┃minor-announcements⁠

Mentions: @Buzzec
